title: All unsafe blocks carry // SAFETY: comments explaining invariants
description: Every unsafe block in wolftpm-sys/src/swtpm.rs, wolftpm/src/device.rs, and wolftpm/src/key.rs has a // SAFETY: comment. This is non-negotiable for a security-sensitive library wrapping a TPM. A contributor removing these comments should be corrected immediately. The safety arguments are also correct (zeroed struct for FFI initial state; stable Box address; no wolfTPM global thread-local state) and should not be removed as 'obvious'.
